                $(this).parent('li').find('ul.sub-menu').first().toggleClass('visible');

            }).on('mouseout', function() {
                $(this).parent().removeClass('is-hover');
            })
        });
    });

				<div class="et_pb_text_inner"><h3 class="common_heading1 with_line mt-0 aos-init aos-animate" data-aos="fade-left" data-aos-duration="1000">BESPOKE LUXURY ATELIER</h3></div>
			</div><div class="et_pb_module et_pb_text et_pb_text_2  et_pb_text_align_left et_pb_bg_layout_light">
				
				
				
				
				<div class="et_pb_text_inner"><p data-aos="fade-up" data-aos-duration="1200" class="aos-init aos-animate">CASTALIA COLLECTIONS a Miami-based Atelier Studio that brings together a legacy of over 100 years of masterful Italian craftsmanship and bespoke traditions under one design house. Our goal is to seamlessly bridge access to the world’s highest level of luxury woodworks, bespoke furniture manufacturing, and finely curated building materials, achieving distinguished luxury projects and trend-forward products that only the Made in Italy heritage can offer.</p>
<p data-aos="fade-up" data-aos-duration="1400" class="aos-init aos-animate">We collaborate exclusively with the A&D industry and lifestyle design visionaries alike to create exquisitely tailored architectural millwork and bespoke furniture collections for both residential and commercial projects.</p>
<p data-aos="fade-up" data-aos-duration="1600" class="aos-init aos-animate">We invite you to visit our Miami-based Atelier Studio, where design professionals will enjoy a highly interactive and sophisticated experience with access to thousands of materials and endless finishes, coming together in a full range of designer lifestyle-driven proposals and services such as 3D visualizations, technical planning and product development complimented by precisely executed white-glove delivery and installations.</p>
<p data-aos="fade-up" data-aos-duration="1600" class="aos-init aos-animate">Make your home a true Casa Italia with CASTALIA!</p></div>
			</div>
			</div><div class="et_pb_column et_pb_column_1_2 et_pb_column_2  et_pb_css_mix_blend_mode_passthrough et-last-child">

				<span class="et_pb_image_wrap has-box-shadow-overlay"><div class="box-shadow-overlay"></div><img decoding="async" width="1302" height="1434" src="https://castalia-collections.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/ABOUT-US-IMAGE-.jpg" alt="" title="ABOUT-US-IMAGE-" srcset="https://castalia-collections.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/ABOUT-US-IMAGE-.jpg 1302w, https://castalia-collections.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/ABOUT-US-IMAGE--1280x1410.jpg 1280w, https://castalia-collections.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/ABOUT-US-IMAGE--980x1079.jpg 980w, https://castalia-collections.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/ABOUT-US-IMAGE--480x529.jpg 480w" sizes="(min-width: 0px) and (max-width: 480px) 480px, (min-width: 481px) and (max-width: 980px) 980px, (min-width: 981px) and (max-width: 1280px) 1280px, (min-width: 1281px) 1302px, 100vw" class="wp-image-987511502"></span>

				<div class="et_pb_module et_pb_text et_pb_text_4  et_pb_text_align_left et_pb_bg_layout_light">
				
				
				
				
				<div class="et_pb_text_inner"><h1>Emerson Henao</h1></div>
			</div><div class="et_pb_module et_pb_text et_pb_text_5  et_pb_text_align_center et_pb_bg_layout_light">
				
				
				
				
				<div class="et_pb_text_inner"><p>President & Design Director</p>
<p>Meet our highly dedicated President and Design Director at Castalia Collections, boasting over 15 years of experience in Home Furnishings. With an extensive background in leading European luxury brands like FENDI Casa, Bentley Home collections, Trussardi Casa, and Bugatti Home collections, he brings invaluable expertise.</p>
<p>His relentless pursuit of innovation and excellence in manufacturing oversight, coupled with his connoisseurship of high-end Italian design, underscores his vision. He aims to bring high-end luxury living to a broader market, ensuring accessibility while providing exceptional design services and delivering world-class luxury home goods with bespoke finishes.</p></div>
			</div>
			</div>
				
				
				
				
			</div><div class="et_pb_row et_pb_row_4 et_animated et_pb_equal_columns et_pb_gutters2">
				<div class="et_pb_column et_pb_column_1_2 et_pb_column_6  et_pb_css_mix_blend_mode_passthrough">
				
				
				
				
				<div class="et_pb_module et_pb_text et_pb_text_6  et_pb_text_align_left et_pb_bg_layout_light">
				
				
				
				
				<div class="et_pb_text_inner"><h1>Yordany Ovalle</h1></div>
			</div><div class="et_pb_module et_pb_text et_pb_text_7  et_pb_text_align_center et_pb_bg_layout_light">
				
				
				
				
				<div class="et_pb_text_inner"><div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element ">
<div class="wpb_wrapper">
<p>CEO & Design Director</p>
</div>
</div>
<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element ">
<div class="wpb_wrapper">
<p>Yordany Ovalle, a professional Industrial Designer and furniture designer, graduated from the University ISDI (Cuba).</p>
<p>Attuned to the latest trends in Home design innovations, design technology, and the endless possibilities achievable with raw materials, his designs thrive through his fluency in the manufacturing language.</p>
<p>Together with Castalia’s stablished partnerships with some of the world’s most sophisticated factories in the Luxury Italian home furnishings industry, his designs come to life. The originality and sensitivity embedded in his creations position him as the creative force behind Castalia Collections.</p>
</div>
</div></div>

				<div class="et_pb_text_inner"><h2></h2>
<h1>BESPOKE DESIGN<br>& LUXURY SERVICE</h1>
<p>Castalia Collection is a design partner for the A&D community, offering an exclusive tailored experience of product development that is client inspired and manufactured through the world’s finest Italian Manufacturers.</p></div>

<h1>WORLD CLASS DELIVERY<br>& INSTALLATIONS</h1>
<p>Our superior team of skilled professionals thrives on excellence in care, service, and attention. Our priority is to deliver projects and manage installations with meticulous attention to detail, providing a seamless experience for the Trade Community.</p></div>
